story.title: Cannabis Recalls & Advisories | Office of Cannabis Policy

contentBrief.headline: Cannabis Recalls & Advisories | Office of Cannabis Policy
contentBrief.angle: Cannabis Recalls & Advisories | Office of Cannabis Policy. This update affects Maine cannabis businesses and may require updates to existing guide content.

agentPrompt: Write a content update about "Cannabis Recalls & Advisories | Office of Cannabis Policy". Use the following facts: - Please find details about recent medical cannabis patient advisories and adult use cannabis recalls issued by the Maine Office of Cannabis Policy below. January 22, 2026: MarijuanaVille Patient Advisory – Cannabis Concentrate – Denty Honey, Orange Kush Breath, Pineapple Mimosa, Raw Honey, ... - Source: https://www.maine.gov/dafs/ocp/resources/recalls - Published: recently Key points to cover: - Product safety implications - Patient health considerations Tone: informational Write for the Maine Dispensary Guide audience: cannabis operators, entrepreneurs, and patients seeking accurate compliance information.
